rationale: Gov't Code §2001.146 governs motions for rehearing in contested administrative cases. It is procedurally unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A motion for rehearing in a contested case must be filed by a party not later than the 25th day after the date the decision or order that is the subject of the motion is signed
_note: The cited rule concerns administrative rehearing procedures and has no bearing on the proposed homestead exemption increase.
